| Project                          | Short read                                                                                                        | Best fit                                                   |
|----------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------|
| [[id:ccd1542a-488e-430d-9eba-f24c01c26bbe][Open5GS]]                          | Mature EPC + 5GC stack with SA/NSA support, Helm/Kubernetes support, and a management UI                          | private networks, migration from 4G, broader lab work      |
| [[id:7ac7694b-85ce-4cd8-b9b3-4423f6b58454][free5GC]]                          | SA-first community core with strong research visibility and low resource usage                                    | teaching, research, PoC, experimental testbeds             |
| [[id:c1e0d4da-6c9f-44ff-a3b7-bfc077212d04][Magma]]                            | More platform-like than a simple core; emphasizes orchestration, edge gateways, and automation                    | distributed private wireless, edge, telco-style operations |
| [[id:ed3c730b-c284-410c-80bf-7f0c21d3105b][OpenAirInterface (OAI)]]           | Full SBA core closely aligned with the OAI ecosystem and strong data-plane positioning                            | MEC, OAI-based validation, high-performance labs           |
| [[id:6773c62d-c676-4817-88e9-9419fcd0a37c][Aether 5G]]                        | Cloud-native private 5G stack oriented around Kubernetes-native operations                                        | enterprise private 5G, campus, edge                        |
| [[id:cb65fc02-b2de-48eb-a95a-5e022cdeb8fa][Ella Core]]                        | Lightweight single-binary SA core optimized for minimal footprint and simple deployment                           | remote, industrial, SME, rapid-deployment use              |
| QCore                            | Experimental ultra-minimal Rust core for constrained environments, not feature-complete relative to mature stacks | novel research, drones, space, highly constrained systems  |

-0.010188 0.023568 -0.026693 0.011665 0.006102 -0.026052 0.035725 0.048524 0.048803 0.108896 0.042004 -0.041643 -0.087299 0.025575 -0.003840 -0.085258 -0.033255 -0.002464 -0.033089
:END:
+ [[id:ccd1542a-488e-430d-9eba-f24c01c26bbe][Open5GS]] is the most rounded practical choice in this list when dual-mode support and broad feature coverage matter more than radical minimalism.
+ [[id:7ac7694b-85ce-4cd8-b9b3-4423f6b58454][free5GC]] is the most natural SA-first option for learning, standards exploration, and repeatable academic testbeds.
+ [[id:c1e0d4da-6c9f-44ff-a3b7-bfc077212d04][Magma]] should be evaluated as an operating platform, not just as a drop-in 5GC binary set. Its orchestration model is part of the decision.
+ [[id:ed3c730b-c284-410c-80bf-7f0c21d3105b][OpenAirInterface (OAI)]] is attractive when the surrounding workflow already depends on OAI RAN, srsRAN interop, or performance-focused validation.
+ [[id:6773c62d-c676-4817-88e9-9419fcd0a37c][Aether 5G]] and Canonical Charmed Aether SD Core are best read as cloud-native private-5G operational stacks, not just standalone telecom functions.
+ [[id:cb65fc02-b2de-48eb-a95a-5e022cdeb8fa][Ella Core]] stands out for collapsing the core into a very small operational footprint.
+ QCore is notable mainly for experimentation in environments where size and simplicity matter more than completeness.
  
* 5G Core Key Functions
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       d03c56d4-559e-420a-9af0-406b960633c3
:END:
Within the 5G system, the core network is the part responsible for registration, session control, policy, mobility management, and connectivity to data networks.
+ [[id:2b132bf8-b177-425d-9de5-183b1d430c99][Session Management Function (SMF)]]
+ [[id:404104ca-d644-4244-aad5-ac06c9fd5810][User Plane Function (UPF)]]

* Reference List
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       ee2f6530-98fb-42a1-b09a-70c052b538cc
:END:
